headline: Eastman Chemical Certified by SCS Global for Commitment to Circularity
summary: EMN earns ISO 59014 certification for its Kingsport site, validating its methanolysis recycling tech and circular economy efforts through 2029.

headline: BASFY Opens Georgia Catalyst R&D Hub to Advance FCC Tech Solutions
